page.title: Future Simple: Questions and Short Answers
page.subtitle_html: Future Simple: Questions and Short Answers — Will you...?, Yes, I will. / No, I won't.

blocks.body: {"level":"A1–A2","intro":"У питаннях Future Simple ставимо will перед підметом, а після підмета — V1.","rules":[{"label":"Will + subject + V1?","color":"emerald","text":"Одна модель працює для всіх підметів.","example":"Will you call? / Will she come?"},{"label":"Wh-questions","color":"blue","text":"Питальне слово став перед will.","example":"When will they arrive? / What will you do?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"У короткій відповіді повторюй will або won't.","example":"Yes, I will. / No, she won't."}]}

{"title":"1. Базові моделі","intro":"Постав will перед підметом.","items":[{"label":"Yes / No question","title":"Will + subject + V1?","subtitle":"Will you help? / Will they stay?"},{"label":"Wh-question","title":"Wh-word + will + subject + V1?","subtitle":"Where will she live? / When will it start?"},{"label":"Positive answer","title":"Yes, subject + will.","subtitle":"Yes, I will. / Yes, they will."},{"label":"Negative answer","title":"No, subject + won't.","subtitle":"No, he won't. / No, we won't."}]}

{"title":"2. Питання і короткі відповіді","intro":"У короткій відповіді не потрібно повторювати головне дієслово.","rows":[{"en":"Will you call me?","ua":"Yes, I will. / No, I won't.","note":"will / won't"},{"en":"Will she be there?","ua":"Yes, she will. / No, she won't.","note":"be remains V1"},{"en":"When will they arrive?","ua":"They'll arrive at six.","note":"wh-word first"}],"warning":"Не кажи Do you will...?, Will she comes...? або Yes, I do."}

{"title":"3. Типові помилки","items":[{"label":"Помилка 1","color":"rose","title":"Додавати do перед will.","wrong":"❌ Do you will come?","right":"✅ Will you come?"},{"label":"Помилка 2","color":"amber","title":"Змінювати дієслово після підмета.","wrong":"❌ Will she calls?","right":"✅ Will she call?"},{"label":"Помилка 3","color":"sky","title":"Відповідати через do / does.","wrong":"❌ Yes, he does.","right":"✅ Yes, he will."}]}

{"title":"4. Короткий підсумок","items":["Питання = Will + subject + V1?","Wh-питання = Wh-word + will + subject + V1?","Короткі відповіді: Yes, ... will. / No, ... won't.","Не використовуй do / does разом із will."]}

{"title":"5. Практика","select_title":"Вправа 1. Обери правильне питання","select_intro":"Обери правильну форму Future Simple.","selects":[{"label":"a) Will she call? / b) Will she calls?","prompt":"Який варіант правильний?","answer":"a"},{"label":"a) Yes, I do. / b) Yes, I will.","prompt":"Яка коротка відповідь правильна?","answer":"b"}],"options":["a","b"],"input_title":"Вправа 2. Склади питання","input_intro":"Постав слова у правильному порядку.","inputs":[{"before":"you / tomorrow / will / come?","after":"→","answer":"Will you come tomorrow?"},{"before":"when / arrive / they / will?","after":"→","answer":"When will they arrive?"}]}

{"title":"Уроки Future Simple","items":[{"label":"Forms and Use","url":"/theory/future-simple/future-simple-forms","current":false},{"label":"Negatives","url":"/theory/future-simple/future-simple-negatives","current":false},{"label":"Questions and Short Answers","url":"/theory/future-simple/future-simple-questions","current":true},{"label":"Time Expressions","url":"/theory/future-simple/future-simple-time-expressions","current":false},{"label":"Will vs Be Going To","url":"/theory/future-simple/will-vs-be-going-to","current":false}]}
